notes: Accepted by official SWE-bench Pro local Docker evaluator. The initial scout patch passed syntax but failed the selected tests because hidden expectations referenced the renamed Python handler cmd_repeat_last; Codex updated the handler names while preserving old aliases. The qutebrowser raw sample for this run was kept redacted with blank patch/test_patch fields; two evaluator reruns were due to local raw-sample field-shape cleanup, not task failures.
